name: Story - Family Progress
description: Parallel family-story developments for character generation. Results are filtered by thread key in code.

results.description: The inheritance matter returned in conversation after a season of hardship made old claims suddenly practical again.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: Someone outside the household began speaking of the inheritance as if your family's claim were only a temporary inconvenience.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: Old papers, witnesses, and memories were dragged out again, and none of them agreed cleanly enough to settle the inheritance.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: A promised portion of the inheritance was quietly spent in advance by people too certain the law would eventually agree with them.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: The old feud sharpened when a slight, perhaps accidental and perhaps not, gave everyone reason to remember earlier injuries.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: Neighbors were drawn into the feud as witnesses, messengers, and partisans, which made the quarrel harder to pretend was private.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The feud persisted through courtesy, trade, and worship alike, touching any place where both households expected to be seen.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: A younger member of one house repeated the quarrel badly enough to remind both families how easily habit becomes escalation.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: An old favor was called in at a bad moment, and your household learned again that gratitude can be collected like rent.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A small service was requested in the patron's name, but everyone in the house understood the request measured future obedience.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The debt to your patron broadened from courtesy into expectation, and older relatives began speaking more carefully at table.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A favor refused elsewhere came down upon your household instead, which taught everyone how little choice hides inside dependence.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The family scandal was hinted at by someone who should not have known enough to speak so confidently.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Rumor began escaping the household in the form of courtesy, innuendo, and sympathy too pointed to be mistaken for kindness.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: A passing mention of the old scandal altered the mood of a room quickly enough to show the matter had never truly gone cold.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Someone with no right to the tale repeated just enough of the scandal to prove that secrecy had become porous.
results.name: buried-scandal
